macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: UN cuts global growth forecast as Middle East crisis continues
items.summary: The UN downgraded its outlook for global growth, citing continued disruption from the Middle East crisis and broader weakness in the world economy. The move adds to concerns that inflation, trade friction, and geopolitical risk are weighing on activity worldwide.

items.title: Indian equity markets trade higher amid positive global cues
items.summary: Indian stocks opened higher in early trade, supported by upbeat global sentiment and a recovery in risk appetite. Lower oil prices also helped ease pressure on domestic markets.

items.title: Stock markets rally in early trade as global peers improve and oil prices ease
items.summary: Major markets gained in early trading as investors responded to stronger overseas cues and softer energy prices. The move reflects a brief improvement in sentiment after recent volatility tied to inflation and growth concerns.

items.title: ASX 200 tumbles in sharp sell-off amid global market concerns
items.summary: Australia’s ASX 200 fell sharply as investors sold risk assets on renewed worries about global markets. The decline highlights lingering sensitivity to interest-rate uncertainty and broader macroeconomic stress.

items.title: Emerging markets post worst week since March on inflation fears
items.summary: Emerging-market assets suffered their steepest weekly drop since March as inflation concerns and tighter financial conditions pressured sentiment. The sell-off underscores how sensitive developing economies remain to global rate expectations.

items.title: U.N. cuts global growth forecast in Business Brief
items.summary: Caixin reported that the UN lowered its global growth forecast, reinforcing warnings that the world economy is slowing. The update adds to a series of cautious macro signals from international institutions.

items.title: Indian markets open higher on global tech surge and trade optimism
items.summary: Indian equities advanced at the open, tracking strength in global technology stocks and improved trade sentiment. The move suggests investors are rotating back into cyclicals and growth names after recent caution.

items.title: Nvidia earnings: Massive AI adoption remains on track; shares undervalued
items.summary: Nvidia’s results and outlook continued to point to strong AI demand, with commentary suggesting the company still has room for upside. The report reinforces the market’s focus on AI-related earnings as a key driver of U.S. tech performance.

items.title: Breakfast news: Nvidia beats but the market yawns
items.summary: Despite beating expectations, Nvidia’s shares drew a muted reaction, indicating investor concerns may be shifting from earnings beats to valuation and forward guidance. The response illustrates how high expectations are shaping reactions to major tech results.

items.title: What rising bond yields mean for mortgages and credit card rates
items.summary: Rising bond yields are feeding through to higher borrowing costs, with implications for mortgages and consumer credit. The development matters for central-bank policy expectations and the broader rate-sensitive parts of the stock market.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Microsoft Reveals Xbox Game Pass June 2025 Wave 1 Lineup
items.summary: Microsoft has announced the first wave of games coming to Xbox Game Pass in June 2025, ahead of the Xbox Games Showcase. The lineup adds several notable titles for subscribers across console and PC.

items.title: Sony Announces New PlayStation State of Play Showcase for June 2
items.summary: Sony has scheduled a new State of Play presentation for June 2, with Marvel’s Wolverine reportedly expected to appear. The showcase is likely to bring major PlayStation updates and new game reveals.

items.title: Xbox Schedules Summer Showcase and Gears of War: E-Day Direct for June 7
items.summary: Xbox has confirmed a summer showcase alongside a dedicated Gears of War: E-Day Direct for June 7. The events are expected to deliver new trailers, release updates, and potential hardware or service news.

items.title: First Three Resident Evil Games and Breath of Fire IV Now Available on Steam
items.summary: Capcom has brought the original versions of Resident Evil 1, Resident Evil 2, Resident Evil 3, and Breath of Fire IV to Steam. The release lets PC players revisit these classic titles in their original form.

items.title: Team Ninja and Koei Tecmo Announce Nioh 3
items.summary: Nioh 3 was revealed during Sony’s State of Play, giving soulslike fans a new entry in the action-RPG series. The announcement also included immediate gameplay availability for players to try.

items.title: Arc System Works and Sony Unveil New Marvel Fighting Game
items.summary: Sony and Arc System Works revealed a brand-new fighting game featuring Marvel characters and tag-team battles. The announcement is one of the biggest fighting game reveals from the recent showcase.

items.title: Fortnite Teases Another Free Skin With a Catch
items.summary: Epic Games is offering players another free cosmetic in Fortnite, though the promotion comes with restrictions. The new skin is part of the game’s ongoing seasonal rewards and event-driven content.

items.title: Helldivers 2 Reveals New Force of Law Warbond
items.summary: Arrowhead has announced the upcoming Force of Law Warbond for Helldivers 2. The new content adds fresh gear and progression items for the cooperative shooter’s players.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
